name: The Hauntings: Surveillance
short_description: Monitor haunted locations for anomalies as a technician for a secret government agency. Use various camera modes to collect evidence and identify ghosts. Uncover the truth and prevent public panic in this realistic horror spot-the-difference game.
detailed_description:
Step into the shoes of a technician hired by the secret government agency "Directive 7B" to uncover the truth behind reported haunted locations. Your task is to monitor static cameras placed in supposedly haunted environments and identify anomalies caused by the restless spirits. But that's not all – you must also gather crucial evidence to determine what kind of ghost is haunting the area, preventing the public from learning about the paranormal activities.

Switch between different camera modes to catch every detail, report anomalies through a specialized UI, and ensure no suspicious activity goes unnoticed. Balance your focus between spotting differences and conducting a thorough ghost hunt. Can you handle the pressure and uncover the truth?

Key Features:
  • Five Haunted Locations: Unlock and explore five distinct levels, each with its own spooky atmosphere and challenges.
  • Camera Modes: Utilize various camera modes to detect different types of evidence and anomalies.
  • Four different difficulties to provide even higher challenges
  • 21 Different ghost types with their own evidence combinations
